policy: Portfolio translation converts configuration and historical memory into allocation posture, not automatic buy/sell instructions. It must disclose rationale, invalidation, sizing logic, and missing evidence.

posture.label: Selective risk-on with restrictive-money discipline
posture.durationPosture: Avoid unruled long-duration exposure until real-yield pressure eases
posture.creditPosture: Avoid weak-credit beta; contained spreads allow holding quality exposure
posture.equityPosture: Favor quality growth and infrastructure enablers; avoid chasing broad speculative beta
posture.commodityPosture: Maintain attention to power, copper, uranium, energy, and physical bottlenecks

allocationBias.bias: Overweight relative to normal risk-on periods
allocationBias.rationale: Money axis is restrictive at 82, so cash still competes with duration and speculative risk.
Risk appetite remains strong at 73, but high real yields require quality and ruled entries rather than broad chasing.
Physical constraint axis is elevated at 88 and aligns with AI infrastructure and industrial bottleneck narratives.
Credit is contained but not strong enough to justify indiscriminate weak-balance-sheet exposure.
Restrictive money and real-yield pressure remain the primary constraint on duration multiples.

riskRules.watch: HY OAS / IG OAS widening while small caps break lower
riskRules.action: Downgrade risk posture and raise cash / defensive allocation.

riskRules.watch: DXY and USDJPY surge while volatility stops confirming calm
riskRules.action: Reduce speculative exposure and monitor global liquidity stress.

riskRules.watch: 10Y real yield falls materially without credit deterioration
riskRules.action: Duration and growth multiple pressure may ease; reassess add permission.

riskRules.watch: Copper / power / energy inputs accelerate while inflation expectations rise
riskRules.action: Increase focus on infrastructure beneficiaries and inflation-sensitive risks.

historicalLessons.lesson: Do not ignore real-yield pressure even when leadership remains strong.
Contained stress can break quickly if funding pressure transmits.
Restrictive money can work with lag; resilience is not proof of safety.
Physical shocks can turn inflation pressure into earnings and margin pressure.

missingEvidence: Portfolio-specific allocation percentages are not yet connected.
Taxable account constraints and existing position weights are not yet integrated.
Ticker-level entry zones are handled outside this macro translation layer.
